task: Generate documentation for the Atlas orchestrator module

symbols.name: SharedContext
symbols.signature:
@dataclass
class SharedContext(week_of: str, sage_triage: dict[str, Any], iris_themes: dict[str, Any], nova_experiments: dict[str, Any], kai_content: dict[str, Any], okr_progress: dict[str, Any])
symbols.docstring: Cross-agent state passed through the weekly orchestration cycle. Each field is populated by its corresponding agent on its scheduled day.

symbols.name: Atlas
symbols.docstring: Hub-and-spoke orchestrator that delegates tasks to specialist agents and manages the weekly Mon-Fri cycle.

symbols.name: delegate
symbols.signature: async def delegate(self, agent_name: str, task: str, context: SharedContext) -> DelegationResult
symbols.docstring: Delegate a task to a specialist agent with retry (MAX_RETRIES=2, exponential backoff + jitter).

symbols.name: run_weekly_cycle
symbols.docstring: Execute the full Mon-Fri orchestration cycle: Sage triage, Iris synthesis, Nova experiments, Kai content, OKR compilation.

task: Generate API reference for the MCP server and tool system

symbols.name: ToolDefinition
symbols.signature: class ToolDefinition(name: str, description: str, input_schema: dict, handler: Callable)
symbols.docstring: Defines an MCP tool with its metadata and async handler function. Use to_manifest() for MCP-compatible tool listing.

symbols.name: MCPServer
symbols.docstring: MCP server implementing JSON-RPC over stdio transport. Registers 14 tools across PostHog, GitHub, and Search categories.

symbols.name: _register_tools
symbols.docstring: Register all ToolDefinition instances for PostHog API, GitHub, and web search tools.

symbols.name: _handle_request
symbols.docstring: Route JSON-RPC requests (initialize, tools/list, tools/call) to the appropriate handler.

task: Generate architecture overview for the OpenClaw system

symbols.name: Atlas
symbols.docstring: Hub-and-spoke orchestrator managing 9 specialist agents across DevRel and Sales pipelines.

symbols.name: Sage
symbols.docstring: Community Manager agent. GitHub issue triage with priority scoring, sentiment analysis, and churn risk detection.

symbols.name: MCPServer
symbols.docstring: MCP server exposing PostHog, GitHub, and web search tools via JSON-RPC over stdio transport.
